summary: Excellent audience/matrix‑quality recording captures a standout second set highlighted by the Miracle→Bertha transition, Peggy‑O, and Shakedown into Sugar Magnolia.
review: The tape, sourced from Joani’s master, offers near‑matrix clarity with only a quirky phase issue on the post‑show interview. Musically the show shines in the second set – the Miracle to Bertha segue, powerful Peggy‑O, and the sweet Shakedown Street into Sugar Magnolia are repeatedly praised, while the first set is noted as merely average.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high star ratings and enthusiastic comments about both performance (especially second‑set highlights) and recording fidelity justify a strong rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clean, almost matrix‑level sound with no noticeable dropouts; the only technical quirk is the post‑show interview being out of phase on one channel.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set deemed average, but the second set builds momentum with strong transitions and a memorable post‑show interview that adds extra flavor.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for beautiful guitar tone and vocal on Peggy-O; his playing shines in the Miracle→Bertha transition.
band_member_comments.Drums: The drum segment received specific praise, noted as a highlight of the second set.
